finalAssistantMessages.text: The direct queue-media verification found all 206 production `post_media` rows and all 206 now have `agentImageDescription.description`. I’m doing one tiny follow-up count for the needs-review denominator so the handoff numbers are complete.

The final queue-media verification is clean: 206/206 queue media rows have imported descriptions, and all 105 needs-review media rows in that queue now have descriptions. I’m checking the repo diff now so I can hand off exactly what changed.

Image description queue completed: `data/content/analysis/image-descriptions/2018-2021-site-images-image-description-queue.json` Items: 206/206 described, 0 needs human review. Import: 206 imported descriptions, 0 skipped. DB media still missing descriptions: 0; not covered by this queue: 0. Human-review queue items: 0. DB needs-review rows with descriptions: 105/105. Notes: the queue’s printed status command had an invalid range-shaped `--month=2018-01-01_2021-12-31`; I ran the equivalent supported `--from=2018-01-01 --to=2021-12-31` status, then verified directly against the 206 queue media IDs in production. The `artist-helper` worktree is clean.
